findings.title: Add negative tests for the new URMA failover gflag validators
findings.impact: The PR adds validation branches for non-finite/out-of-range success ratios and zero min-sample counts, but the added UT/ST coverage only exercises valid values and threshold behavior after the flags are already accepted. A future regression could silently accept an invalid operator config such as ratio > 1, NaN/inf, or min_sample_count=0 without any test failing.
findings.fix: Add a focused flags/config test that attempts invalid urma_failover_success_rate_ratio values (<0, >1, NaN/inf if the parser can supply them) and urma_failover_min_sample_count=0, and asserts the validator rejects them; keep the existing valid-value failover tests as-is.
